supply_chain.dependencies: Dependence on Sony, Microsoft, and Nintendo for platform licenses and hardware manufacturing approval. Reliance on Apple App Store and Google Play Store for mobile game distribution. Significant portion of mobile revenue (92.9%) derived from Apple and Google platforms. Platform manufacturers control selection of approved manufacturers for physical software products.
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain disruptions affecting console availability. Geopolitical events (Russia-Ukraine war, Israel-Hamas war) may complicate supply chain constraints. Platform providers can change fee structures, terms of service, and policies at their discretion. Concentration risk with limited number of platform partners. Hardware supply issues due to component shortages or tariffs on component parts.

regulatory_risks: ESRB ratings and content regulation - products rated AO may not be sold by retailers or certified by platform licensors
International content rating systems and censorship requirements in various countries
Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA) compliance for data collection from children under 13
Age-based privacy laws affecting collection and use of data from players up to 18 years old
EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and UK Data Protection Act 2018
EU Digital Services Act (DSA) content moderation and transparency obligations
Comprehensive privacy laws in approximately 20 U.S. states
Gambling regulations - potential classification of loot boxes and virtual items as gambling in various jurisdictions
Austria regional court ruling that loot boxes constitute illegal gambling
Spain minor protection bill proposing age restrictions on loot boxes
Dutch and EU initiatives to ban or regulate loot boxes
UK Age Appropriate Design Code for online services accessed by children under 18
Apple's AppTracking Transparency framework requiring explicit user permission for advertising identifiers
Google requirements for consent management platforms in UK and EU
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act and UK Bribery Act compliance
Export control laws and national security regulations
Digital services taxes in various countries targeting online advertising and video game sales
OECD Pillar Two global minimum tax regime (15% minimum rate)
Inflation Reduction Act Corporate Alternative Minimum Tax (CAMT)
Tax Cuts and Jobs Act Section 174 capitalization requirements for R&D expenditures
Sanctions compliance and trade restrictions
Tariff structures and import/export compliance laws
China regulatory approval requirements for all games
China privacy law affecting personal information processing
FTC enforcement actions related to consumer protection and privacy violations in games
Proposed federal and state legislation to regulate video game content and sales to minors
Net neutrality regulations affecting internet access and bandwidth
Antitrust and competition regulations
Intellectual property and copyright enforcement across jurisdictions
Employment and labor regulations in multiple countries
Climate change and environmental stewardship regulations

sanction_risks: Sanctions compliance requirements affecting business operations
Russia-Ukraine war impact on operations and regulatory environment
Israel-Hamas war potential effects on business
US-China trade tensions and potential tariff impacts
Discussions ongoing regarding trade restrictions and tariffs on imports from Canada, China, and Mexico
Retaliatory tariffs enacted in response to US trade actions
Uncertainty about future US trade policies, treaties, and tariffs
Potential restrictions on doing business with certain countries or entities
Economic sanctions that may affect international operations
Brexit impact on UK-EU trade relationship and operations
